creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text: Does this still happen with latest?  There are hoops to jump through to build head's clang, as it doesn't build with base gcc (need to buildworld with CC=clang CXX=clang, or gcc48, etc).  I've successfully built many binaries on FreeBSD, and I believe most, if not all, of head can be built with clang now (except csu, which still needs gcc to build).
